prompt: Create a vertical anime-style portrait of an androgynous young adult with pale skin, messy layered glossy black hair with sharp white highlights, and striking golden amber eyes. The character wears a sleek black tailored suit jacket with a crisp white dress shirt and black tie, rendered with dramatic high-contrast ink shadows and shiny folds. Pose the character from mid-thigh upward, body angled slightly left, one hand resting on the hip and the other hand holding a white-and-gray megaphone near the right side of the face, cropped partly at the image edge. Give them a calm, confident, faintly smiling expression while looking toward the viewer. Use a flat vivid yellow background with no text, no logos, and no extra objects. Style: modern manga illustration, clean line art, monochrome clothing with blue-gray shading, sharp highlights, detailed tousled hair strands, elegant proportions, polished editorial poster composition, vertical 9:16 framing.
